q: What does Nietzsche mean by the will to power? Answer using the connected corpus and quote it verbatim.
final:
I tried to retrieve what the connected corpus says about Nietzsche’s “will to power,” but the retrieval tools did not provide any usable text to quote.

- A local search did find a note that looks relevant: **“Ницше — По ту сторону добра и зла”** at **https://trip2g.com/ru/hub/nietzsche**.
- However, when I opened that note with `note_html`, the tool returned **empty text** (`"text": ""`), so there is nothing I can quote verbatim from it.
- I also attempted a targeted federated search with `federated_search(..., kb_id="nietzsche")`, but the system responded: **“Federation is not configured for kb_id "nietzsche".”**

Because your request requires **verbatim quotes grounded in retrieved material**, I can’t answer “What does Nietzsche mean by the will to power?” from this corpus yet.

If you tell me the exact connected corpus/kb_id that contains Nietzsche (or what language you prefer: en or ru), I can try again and quote the relevant passages verbatim.
